name: Saint Hermit of the Southern Land Zhuangzi (The Nanhua Immortal)
page_title: Saint Hermit of the Southern Land Zhuangzi (The Nanhua Immortal) 南華老仙莊子 (南華真人) [Warring States, Historic] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Appears before Zhang Jue and bestows to him the Way of Peace. The Nanhua Immortal.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	南華老仙莊子 (南華真人)


	 Pronunciation 
	Nan2hua2lao3xian1 Zhuang1zi3 (Nan2hua2zhen1ren2)


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Nánhuálǎoxiān Zhuāngzǐ (Nánhuázhēnrén)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Nan-hua-lao-hsien Chuang-tzŭ (Nan-hua-chên-jên)

	 Other Names 
	Lao Zhuang (老庄), Lao Zi (老子), 

	 Name Notes 
	Introduces in Romance of the Three Kingdoms, Chapter 1, with “吾乃南華老仙也” alluding to “The Nanhua Immortal,” Zhuangzi, of the Warring States Period.

full_text:
Saint Hermit of the Southern Land Zhuangzi (The Nanhua Immortal) 南華老仙莊子 (南華真人)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Saint Hermit of the Southern Land Zhuangzi (南華老仙莊子), styledThe Nanhua Immortal (南華真人). Appears before Zhang Jue and bestows to him the Way of Peace. The Nanhua Immortal. Saint Hermit of the Southern Land Zhuangzi was an historic figure affiliated with Warring States.
